# Yuri Biagini — Artist Website
# https://yuri-biagini.florenceegi.com

> This is the official website of artist Yuri Biagini.
> It is part of the FlorenceEGI ecosystem (florenceegi.com).

## About
Yuri Biagini is an artist. This website showcases their works,
exhibitions, press coverage, and provides contact information.

## Pages
- /it/ — Home page (Italian, default)
- /en/ — Home page (English)
- /[locale]/works — Gallery of artworks
- /[locale]/about — Artist biography and timeline
- /[locale]/exhibitions — Past and upcoming exhibitions
- /[locale]/press — Press coverage and articles
- /[locale]/contact — Contact form

## Languages
Available in: Italian (it), English (en), French (fr),
German (de), Spanish (es), Chinese (zh).

## Artworks
All artworks are certified on Algorand blockchain via FlorenceEGI.
Each artwork links to art.florenceegi.com for purchase and
blockchain verification details.

## Contact
Email: yuri@florenceegi.com
Platform: art.florenceegi.com

## Technical
Built with Next.js. Content managed via Sanity CMS.
Artwork data served from FlorenceEGI API.
